igbo.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — onye nyocha mgbakọ na mwepụ 3D dabere na ngọngọ. Jiri WASD ịkwaga, òké ịlele, pịa aka ekpe ịgbaji ngọngọ, pịa aka nri itinye ngọngọ.
igbo.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Bipụta kaadị iji wuo ihe owuwu a site na kubu anụ ahụ
igbo.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Asụsụ ụlọ nke nwa akwụkwọ maka okwu asụsụ abụọ nke NPC
igbo.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Asụsụ ụlọ nke nwa akwụkwọ — NPC ga-asụ asụsụ abụọ
igbo.time_of_day_environment_preset: Oge ụbọchị / ntọala gburugburu ebe obibi
igbo.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Bupụ ihe owuwu dị ka faịlụ STL maka mbipụta 3D
igbo.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Were foto ihuenyo nke ụwa gị (echekwara ya na nbudata)
igbo.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Bipụta akwụkwọ ọrụ nnyemaka maka ihe ọmụmụ a
igbo.import_a_world_from_json_file: Bubata ụwa site na faịlụ JSON
igbo.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Bupụ nyocha nnọkọ dị ka CSV maka nyocha
igbo.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Bupụ akụkọ nlekota ọganihu MTSS (nhazi ọkwa RTI, data ogologo oge)
igbo.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Kekọrịta ụwa a na ọbá akwụkwọ klas
igbo.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Chọgharịa ụwa ndị òtù klas kesara
igbo.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Kọwaa isiokwu ihe ọmụmụ geometry maka ọgbọ AI
igbo.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Chọgharịa ihe ọmụmụ echekwara nke AI mepụtara
igbo.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Nụchaa: "Mee ka o sie ike" / "Tinye NPC ọzọ" / "Gbanwee isiokwu ka ọ bụrụ oké osimiri"...
igbo.edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Dezie JSON adịghị nke ihe ọmụmụ n'aka
igbo.correct_answers_this_session: Azịza ziri ezi na nnọkọ a
igbo.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Eriri kompas NPC nke na-egosi ntụzịaka metụtara NPC ọ bụla site na ihu igwefoto
igbo.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Mechie ihe mkpuchi niile mepere emepe ma laghachi na nlele egwuregwu
igbo.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Mechie ihe mkpuchi niile ma laghachi na egwuregwu 3D (ma ọ bụ pịa Shift+Esc)
igbo.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: Gịnị ka NPC kwesịrị ịsị? (dịka "Lee ihe owuwu dị n'azụ m!")
igbo.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Nhọrọ azịza, nke kewara site na mkpụrụ ahịrị kwụ ọtọ
igbo.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Gbanwee mkpọsa nhazi nke ọgụgụ ihuenyo (mkpịsị C)
igbo.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Gbanwee ọnọdụ ofufe (ma ọ bụ pịa Space ugboro abụọ)
igbo.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Hichapụ naanị ngọngọ GỊ tinyere (ihe owuwu ihe ọmụmụ na-anọgide). Bara uru maka ịmaliteghachi nnwale.
igbo.skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Mafee nkuzi ma gaa n'ihe ọmụmụ
igbo.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Gịnị bụ ihe kachasị masị gị nke ị chọtara? Kedu atụmatụ nyeere gị aka idozi nsogbu?
igbo.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Pịa ịnụ ntụgharị asụsụ a na-agụ n'olu dara ụda
igbo.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Sụgharịa mkparịta ụka a na AI (ọ na-eji otu arịrịọ AI)
igbo.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, ọ na-esiri m ike iche echiche ugbu a. Gbalịa ịjụ n'ụzọ ọzọ!
igbo.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_3d_world: Gbanwee ihuenyo zuru ezu maka ụwa 3D

kinyarwanda.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — umushakashatsi w'imibare 3D ushingiye ku tubari. Koresha WASD kugira ngo unyure, imbeba kugira ngo urebe, kanda ibumoso kugira ngo umene utubari, kanda iburyo kugira ngo ushyire utubari.
kinyarwanda.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Sohora ikarita kugira ngo wubake iyi nyubako ukoresheje ibikoresho bifatika
kinyarwanda.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Ururimi rw'umunyeshuri rwo mu rugo ku magambo y'indimi ebyiri za NPC
kinyarwanda.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Ururimi rw'umunyeshuri rwo mu rugo — NPC bazavuga indimi ebyiri
kinyarwanda.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Sohora inyubako nk'idosiye STL ku icapiro rya 3D
kinyarwanda.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Fata ifoto y'ekran y'isi yawe (ibikwa muri za download)
kinyarwanda.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Sohora urupapuro rw'imyitozo rufasha kuri iri somo
kinyarwanda.import_a_world_from_json_file: Injiza isi uvanye mu idosiye JSON
kinyarwanda.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Sohora isesengura ry'igihe nka CSV ku bushakashatsi
kinyarwanda.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Sohora raporo yo gukurikirana iterambere ya MTSS (icyiciro cy'urwego RTI, amakuru y'igihe kirekire)
kinyarwanda.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Sangiza iyi si mu isomero ry'ishuri
kinyarwanda.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Reba isi zasangiwe na bagenzi b'ishuri
kinyarwanda.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Sobanura ingingo y'isomo rya geometiri ku ikorwa rya AI
kinyarwanda.generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Ubujyakuzimu bw'ikorwa: umubare w'inzira za AI
kinyarwanda.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Reba amasomo yabitswe yakozwe na AI
kinyarwanda.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Noza: "Rigore" / "Ongeraho NPC nyinshi" / "Hindura ingingo ube inyanja"...
kinyarwanda.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Umurongo wa kompas wa NPC werekana icyerekezo gifitanye isano kuri buri NPC uhereye ku cyerekezo cya kamera
kinyarwanda.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Funga ibipfukisho byose byafunguwe usubire ku ireba ry'umukino
kinyarwanda.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Funga ibipfukisho byose usubire ku mukino wa 3D (cyangwa ukande Shift+Esc)
kinyarwanda.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: NPC akwiye kuvuga iki? (urugero "Reba inyubako iri inyuma yanjye!")
kinyarwanda.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Amahitamo y'ibisubizo, atandukanyijwe n'inyuguti y'umurongo uhagaze
kinyarwanda.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Hindura amatangazo y'imisozi y'umusomyi w'ekran (urufunguzo C)
kinyarwanda.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Hindura uburyo bwo guguruka (cyangwa ukande Space inshuro ebyiri)
kinyarwanda.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Siba gusa utubari WEWE washyizeho (inyubako z'isomo zigumaho). Ningombwa mu gutangira ubushakashatsi bushya.
kinyarwanda.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Ni iki gishishikaje cyane wavumbuye? Ni ubuhe buryo bwagufashije gukemura ibibazo?
kinyarwanda.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Kanda kugira ngo wumve ubusobanuro busomwa mu ijwi rirenga
kinyarwanda.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Sobanura iki kiganiro na AI (ikoresha icyifuzo kimwe cya AI)
kinyarwanda.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, biragoye kuri njye gutekereza ubu. Gerageza kubaza mu bundi buryo!
kinyarwanda.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_3d_world: Hindura ekran yuzuye ku isi ya 3D

lingala.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — moluki ya matematiki 3D oyo etongami na babiloki. Salelá WASD mpo na koningana, souris mpo na kotala, fina lobɔkɔ ya mwasi mpo na kobuka babiloki, fina lobɔkɔ ya mobali mpo na kotia babiloki.
lingala.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Bimisá karte mpo na kotonga ndako oyo na bakubu ya solo
lingala.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Lokota ya ndako ya moyekoli mpo na maloba ya minɔkɔ mibale ya NPC
lingala.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Lokota ya ndako ya moyekoli — NPC bakoloba na minɔkɔ mibale
lingala.time_of_day_environment_preset: Ngonga ya mokolo / bokɛngɛli ya zinga-zinga
lingala.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Bimisá bandako lokola fisye STL mpo na ekomi ya 3D
lingala.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Kamatá foto ya ekran ya mokili na yo (ebombami na ba-téléchargement)
lingala.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Bimisá lokasa ya mosala ya lisalisi mpo na liteya oyo
lingala.import_a_world_from_json_file: Kotisá mokili kowuta na fisye JSON
lingala.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Bimisá analyse ya session lokola CSV mpo na bolukiluki
lingala.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Bimisá lapolo ya bolandeli ya bokoli MTSS (bokaboli ya baniveau RTI, ba-données ya molai)
lingala.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Kabolá mokili oyo na bibliotɛki ya kelasi
lingala.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Talá bamokili oyo baninga ya kelasi bakaboli
lingala.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Limbolá motó ya liteya ya jeometri mpo na bokeli ya AI
lingala.generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Bozindo ya bokeli: motángo ya baleki ya AI
lingala.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Talá mateya ebombami oyo AI esalaki
lingala.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Bongisá: "Salá yango makasi koleka" / "Bakisá NPC mingi" / "Bóngola motó ezala mbu"...
lingala.edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Bongisá JSON ya mbiso ya liteya na mabɔkɔ
lingala.blocks_placed_this_session: Babiloki oyo etyami na session oyo
lingala.correct_answers_this_session: Biyano ya solo na session oyo
lingala.xp_earned_this_session: XP oyo ezwami na session oyo
lingala.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Bande ya boussole ya NPC oyo emonisi epai NPC mɔ́kɔ mɔ́kɔ ezali kotalisa uta na etaleli ya kamera
lingala.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Kanga ba-overlay nyonso oyo efungwami mpe zongá na komonana ya lisano
lingala.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Kanga ba-overlay nyonso mpe zongá na lisano ya 3D (to fina Shift+Esc)
lingala.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: NPC asengeli koloba nini? (ndakisa "Talá ndako oyo ezali nsima na ngai!")
lingala.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Baponi ya eyano, ekabolami na elembo ya molɔngɔ́ ya ngambo
lingala.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Bóngola basango ya ba-coordonnée ya motángi ya ekran (buton C)
lingala.announce_coordinates_to_screen_reader_: Sakolá ba-coordonnée na motángi ya ekran (C)
lingala.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Bóngola lolenge ya kopumbwa (to fina Space mbala mibale)
lingala.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Longolá kaka babiloki oyo YO otiaki (bandako ya liteya etikali). Ezali na ntina mpo na kobanda lisusu komeka.
lingala.skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Leká tutorial mpe kendá na liteya
lingala.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Eloko nini ya kosepelisa mingi oyo omonaki? Ndenge nini esalisaki yo kosilisa mikakatano?
lingala.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Fina mpo na koyoka libongoli oyo etángami na mongongo makasi
lingala.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Bongolá lisolo oyo na AI (esalelaka libiangi moko ya AI)
lingala.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, ezali pasi mpo na ngai kokanisa sikoyo. Meká kotuna na ndenge mosusu!
lingala.close_class_worlds_browser: Kanga moluki ya bamokili ya kelasi
lingala.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_3d_world: Bóngola ekran mobimba mpo na mokili ya 3D
